post_treatment_steps: filtered_washed with deionized water
dried_at 120°C
calcined_at 550°C for 4 h under flowing air
cation-exchange_in NH4NO3 solution at 80°C for 3 times
calcined_in air at 550°C for 4 h
incipient wetness impregnation_with Zn to 2 wt%

extraction_notes: The crystallization conditions are specific to this sample (2 nm b-axis). Acid amount values are not provided in the paper. Selectivity is for light olefins (ethene + propene) as per Table 2. Breakthrough is based on t0.5 (time to 50% conversion) as mentioned in the paper.
